title: Chhara Port
summary:
The Chhara Port is a seaport in  Gir Somnath district of Gujarat, India. The port is situated on the shores of the Arabian Sea. It is about 50 kilometres (31 mi) West of Diu. Chhara Port was commissioned in the 2024 with an LNG Terminal.


== References ==
